title: HAPwave_bids
description: This dataset comprises intracranial EEG recordings from 8 patients during single-pulse electrical stimulation of the limbic system. The data were collected to investigate electrical stimulation-driven network interactions in human brain circuits, with stimulation parameters of 200 microseconds duration, biphasic waveform, and 6 mA amplitude (4 mA for one subject). The dataset is organized according to BIDS specification and includes raw iEEG data with associated metadata and event timing information.
methods_description: Intracranial EEG recordings were obtained from 8 patients at rest in a hospital bed during single-pulse electrical stimulation. Stimulation parameters: 200 microsecond duration, biphasic waveform, 6 mA amplitude (4 mA for subject 7 to minimize interictal responses).

funding_references.funder_name: The DERIVE Office and the Mayo Clinic Center for Biomedical Discovery

funding_references.award_title: CRCNS: Processing speed in the human connectome across the lifespan
